apis.name: LinkedIn Profile
apis.description: Fetch a rich LinkedIn member profile by URL: name, headline, avatar, location, connections and followers, current position, and full work experience with job titles, descriptions, dates, employment/workplace type, and per-role skills, plus education, skills, certifications, honors and awards, languages, projects, publications, and verified/premium/open-to-work flags.

apis.name: LinkedIn Profile (basic)
apis.description: Lightweight profile: name, avatar, location, followers, and a basic experience/education list (company + dates only, no job titles, descriptions, or skills; past companies may be redacted). For full experience detail, skills, certifications, connections, and verified flags use linkedin.profile.

apis.name: LinkedIn Company Search
apis.description: Search LinkedIn companies by keyword with optional location filtering, returning normalized company records.

apis.name: LinkedIn Post Search
apis.description: Search public LinkedIn posts by keyword (text, link, publish date), normalized across providers with transparent failover.

apis.name: LinkedIn Profile Search
apis.description: Search LinkedIn profiles by keyword with optional location and job-title filters. Each match returns a full profile record: name, headline, location, current position, work experience, education, and skills, plus the profile URL, handle, and id. For a cheaper name/headline/URL-only search use linkedin.search_profiles_thin; add emails with linkedin.search_profiles_email.

apis.name: LinkedIn Profile Search + Email
apis.description: People search returning a full profile AND a verified work email for each hit. Search LinkedIn profiles by keyword with optional location and job-title filters; each match returns the full profile record (name, headline, location, current position, work experience, education, and skills, plus the profile URL, handle, and id) together with an emails array carrying the discovered work email and its deliverability. For a full profile without email use linkedin.search_profiles; for a cheaper name/headline/URL-only search use linkedin.search_profiles_thin.

apis.name: LinkedIn Profile Search (basic)
apis.description: Cheap people search: name/handle, headline, VANITY profile URL, location. No full profile or email - for full profiles per hit use linkedin.search_profiles, add emails with linkedin.search_profiles_email.

apis.name: Spotify Podcast
apis.description: Fetch a Spotify podcast show's name, publisher, description, rating, and topics by show URL or ID.

apis.name: Spotify Podcast Episodes
apis.description: List a Spotify podcast show's episodes with titles, durations, descriptions, and release dates by show URL or ID.

apis.name: Spotify Search
apis.description: Search Spotify for matching tracks, albums, artists, podcasts, and playlists by keyword.

apis.name: Spotify Track
apis.description: Fetch a Spotify track's play count, popularity, duration, and album details by track URL or ID.

apis.name: Substack Posts
apis.description: Pull posts from any Substack publication by its URL — or pass a single post URL (…/p/slug) to fetch just that one article. Returns title, subtitle, publish date, paywall status, word count, engagement (reactions, comments, restacks), author profile, and full article HTML.

apis.name: Threads Post
apis.description: Fetch a single Threads post by URL — text, author, engagement counts, and timestamp.

apis.name: Threads Profile
apis.description: Fetch a Threads user's public profile (bio, follower count, verification, profile picture) by username.

apis.name: Threads Search
apis.description: Search public Threads posts by keyword or hashtag and get normalized post records — text, author, and engagement.

apis.name: Threads User Search
apis.description: Search Threads users by name or username and get normalized profile records — username, full name, verification, and picture.

apis.name: Threads User Posts
apis.description: List a Threads user's recent public posts by username — text, engagement counts, and post URLs.

apis.name: TikTok Ad Library Ad
apis.description: Fetch full details for a single TikTok ad — brand, title, spend, CTR, objectives, landing page, and video info — normalized across providers with transparent failover.

apis.name: TikTok Ad Library Search
apis.description: Search TikTok's ad library by keyword — top ads with brand, title, spend, CTR, likes, and video info — normalized across providers with transparent failover.

apis.name: TikTok Audience Demographics
apis.description: Get the audience country breakdown (follower count and share per country) for a TikTok creator by handle, normalized across providers.

apis.name: TikTok Comment Replies
apis.description: List the replies to a TikTok comment with cursor pagination (text, author, likes), normalized across providers.

apis.name: TikTok Followers
apis.description: List the followers of a TikTok account by username, returning each follower's profile basics.

apis.name: TikTok Following
apis.description: List the accounts a TikTok user follows (handle, display name, follower count, bio) by username, normalized across providers.

apis.name: TikTok Hashtag Videos
apis.description: List recent TikTok videos for a hashtag (creator, caption, views, likes, shares), normalized output.

apis.name: TikTok Live
apis.description: Check whether a TikTok creator is live and get the current live room (title, viewers, start time) by handle, normalized across providers.

apis.name: TikTok Profile
apis.description: Fetch a TikTok creator's public profile (followers, likes, bio, verification) by handle, normalized across providers with transparent failover.

apis.name: TikTok Profile Region
apis.description: Resolve the home region (country) of a TikTok creator by handle, normalized across providers with transparent failover.

apis.name: TikTok Profile Videos
apis.description: List a TikTok creator's recent videos (views, likes, comments) by handle with cursor pagination, normalized across providers.

apis.name: TikTok Hashtag Search
apis.description: Search TikTok by hashtag and get matching videos (caption, views, likes, comments, shares) as normalized JSON, across providers with transparent failover.

apis.name: TikTok Keyword Search
apis.description: Search TikTok by keyword and get matching videos (caption, views, likes, comments, shares) as normalized JSON, across providers with transparent failover.

apis.name: TikTok Top Search
apis.description: Search TikTok's top results for a keyword (caption, views, likes, comments, shares) with cursor pagination, normalized across providers.

apis.name: TikTok User Search
apis.description: Search TikTok accounts by keyword (handle, nickname, follower count) with cursor pagination, normalized across providers.

apis.name: TikTok Song
apis.description: Fetch details for a TikTok song or sound — title, author, duration, cover art, and how many videos use it — normalized across providers with transparent failover.

apis.name: TikTok Song Videos
apis.description: List TikTok videos that use a given song or sound — with descriptions, authors, and engagement stats — normalized across providers with transparent failover.

apis.name: TikTok Trending Feed
apis.description: Get TikTok's trending feed for a region (caption, views, likes, comments, author) as normalized JSON, across providers with transparent failover.

apis.name: TikTok Video
apis.description: Fetch a single TikTok video by URL with its caption and engagement counts (views, likes, comments, shares, saves), normalized across providers with transparent failover.

apis.name: TikTok Video Comments
apis.description: List the comments on a TikTok video by URL with cursor pagination (text, author, likes, reply count), normalized across providers.

apis.name: TikTok Video Transcript
apis.description: Fetch the spoken-word transcript of a TikTok video by URL, normalized across providers with transparent failover.

apis.name: TikTok Shop Product
apis.description: Fetch TikTok Shop product details — title, price, sales, seller, and ratings — from a product URL.

apis.name: TikTok Shop Product Reviews
apis.description: Fetch customer reviews for a TikTok Shop product by URL — rating, text, reviewer, country, and verified-purchase flag — normalized across providers with transparent failover.

apis.name: TikTok Shop Search
apis.description: Search TikTok Shop products by keyword across 15 countries: price, sales, rating, and seller info per product, in one normalized response.

apis.name: TikTok Shop Store Products
apis.description: List every product of a TikTok Shop store by URL — title, price, sales, and rating per product plus shop-level stats — with cursor pagination and transparent failover.

apis.name: TikTok Shop User Showcase
apis.description: List the TikTok Shop products a creator showcases — title, price, rating, and sales per product — normalized across providers with transparent failover.

apis.name: Tripadvisor Reviews
apis.description: Fetch the latest reviews for any Tripadvisor hotel, restaurant, or attraction by its page URL — rating, text, date, and trip details as normalized JSON.

apis.name: Tripadvisor Search
apis.description: Search Tripadvisor for hotels, restaurants, and attractions in any destination and get rich place records (ratings, review counts, contact details, pricing) as normalized JSON.

apis.name: Trustpilot Reviews
apis.description: Pull Trustpilot reviews for any company by brand name — star ratings, review text, dates, and reviewer details as clean JSON.

apis.name: Truth Social Post
apis.description: Get a single Truth Social post by its URL - text, author, engagement (likes, comments, shares), and timestamp as clean JSON.

apis.name: Truth Social Profile
apis.description: Get a Truth Social account's public profile by handle - display name, bio, follower/following counts, and post count as clean JSON.

apis.name: Truth Social User Posts
apis.description: List a Truth Social account's recent posts by handle - text, engagement (likes, comments, shares), and timestamps as clean JSON.

apis.name: Twitter Community
apis.description: Fetch a Twitter/X community's public details (name, description, member count, join policy) by URL, normalized across providers with transparent failover.

apis.name: Twitter Community Tweets
apis.description: List recent tweets posted in a Twitter/X community by URL, normalized across providers with transparent failover.

apis.name: X / Twitter Followers
apis.description: Fetch the follower list of any public X (Twitter) account by username with cursor pagination. Limit is a per-page maximum; native pages contain up to 200 accounts unless requireSinglePage selects a bulk lane.

apis.name: X / Twitter Following
apis.description: List the accounts a public X (Twitter) account follows by username with cursor pagination. Limit is a per-page maximum; native pages contain up to 200 accounts unless requireSinglePage selects a bulk lane.

apis.name: Twitter Profile
apis.description: Fetch a Twitter/X account's public profile (followers, tweets, bio, verification) by handle, normalized across providers with transparent failover.

apis.name: X / Twitter Post Replies
apis.description: Fetch the replies to any X (Twitter) post URL as structured records — author, text, and engagement.

apis.name: X / Twitter Search
apis.description: Search X (Twitter) with full advanced-search syntax (operators like from:, since:, until:, min_faves: work inline in the query) and get structured tweets with text, author, engagement, and cursor pagination. Limit is a per-page maximum; native pages contain approximately 20 tweets unless requireSinglePage selects a bulk lane.

apis.name: Twitter Tweet
apis.description: Fetch a single Twitter/X tweet by URL with its full text and engagement counts (likes, retweets, replies, quotes, bookmarks, views), normalized across providers.

apis.name: Twitter Tweet Transcript
apis.description: Extract the spoken transcript from a Twitter/X video tweet by URL, normalized across providers with transparent failover.

apis.name: X / Twitter User Tweets and Replies
apis.description: Get up to the requested limit of tweets and replies authored by an X (Twitter) account in one bulk call, with engagement, views, and language. The current lane returns nextCursor as null; cursor is reserved for future cursor-capable lanes.

apis.name: Upwork Jobs
apis.description: Search Upwork job postings by keyword — up to 25 fresh listings per request.

apis.name: Walmart Product
apis.description: Fetch a Walmart product page by URL and get full product details — title, price, availability, ratings, images, and specs — in one normalized response.

apis.name: Website Crawl
apis.description: Crawl a website and get clean text content from up to 10 pages in one normalized response — ideal for feeding sites into LLMs and search indexes.

apis.name: Web Map
apis.description: Map an entire website into a clean list of its URLs (with titles and descriptions) in a single call.

apis.name: Web Scrape
apis.description: Scrape any web page and get its content back as clean Markdown (or HTML, or raw HTML) plus title and metadata.

apis.name: Website Screenshot
apis.description: Capture a real-browser screenshot of any web page URL.

apis.name: Weibo Hot Search
apis.description: Get the complete current Weibo hot-search ranking with labels and heat values.

apis.name: Weibo Post
apis.description: Fetch a public Weibo post by ID with normalized author and engagement data.

apis.name: Weibo Post Comments
apis.description: List first-level comments on a public Weibo post with pagination.

apis.name: Weibo Profile
apis.description: Fetch a public Weibo profile by user ID with normalized audience and account data.

apis.name: Weibo Advanced Search
apis.description: Search public Weibo posts with optional result, media, and time filters.

apis.name: Weibo User Posts
apis.description: List public posts from a Weibo user with normalized author and engagement data.

apis.name: WhatsApp Number Validator
apis.description: Check whether a phone number is registered on WhatsApp.

apis.name: Yahoo Finance Quote
apis.description: Look up a stock or ETF by ticker symbol and get its Yahoo Finance quote (price, market cap, volume, and key stats) as normalized JSON.

apis.name: Yelp Search
apis.description: Search Yelp for businesses by keyword and location: up to 20 listings with ratings, categories, and core business info per request.

apis.name: YouTube Channel
apis.description: Fetch a YouTube channel's stats (subscribers, video count, total views, description) by handle or channel ID, normalized across providers.

apis.name: YouTube Channel Community Posts
apis.description: List a YouTube channel's community posts by handle or channel ID with cursor pagination (text, likes, image, publish time), normalized across providers.

apis.name: YouTube Channel Live Streams
apis.description: List a YouTube channel's live and past-live streams by handle or channel ID with cursor pagination (title, views, length, publish time), normalized across providers.

apis.name: YouTube Channel Playlists
apis.description: List a YouTube channel's playlists by handle or channel ID with cursor pagination (title, video count, thumbnail), normalized across providers.

apis.name: YouTube Channel Shorts
apis.description: List a YouTube channel's Shorts by handle or channel ID with cursor pagination (title, views, likes, duration), normalized across providers.

apis.name: YouTube Channel Videos
apis.description: List a YouTube channel's videos by handle or channel ID with cursor pagination (title, views, length, publish time), normalized across providers.

apis.name: YouTube Comment Replies
apis.description: List replies to a YouTube comment using a continuation token with cursor pagination (text, author, likes, publish time), normalized across providers.

apis.name: YouTube Community Post
apis.description: Fetch a single YouTube community post by URL (text, images, channel, publish time), normalized across providers.

apis.name: YouTube Playlist
apis.description: List every video in a YouTube playlist — title, length, and channel per video plus playlist owner and totals — normalized across providers with transparent failover.

apis.name: YouTube Search
apis.description: Search YouTube and get matching videos (title, channel, views, length, publish time) as normalized JSON, across providers with transparent failover.

apis.name: YouTube Hashtag Search
apis.description: Search YouTube videos by hashtag with cursor pagination (title, channel, views, length, publish time), normalized across providers.

apis.name: YouTube Trending Shorts
apis.description: List currently trending YouTube Shorts (title, channel, views, likes, duration), normalized across providers.

apis.name: YouTube Video
apis.description: Fetch a YouTube video's metadata (title, channel, views, likes, duration, publish date) by URL or ID, normalized across providers.

apis.name: YouTube Video Comments
apis.description: List the comments on a YouTube video by URL with cursor pagination (text, author, likes, reply count), normalized across providers.

apis.name: YouTube Video Sponsors
apis.description: Detect suspected sponsors and paid promotions in a YouTube video by URL (sponsor names, websites, confidence), normalized across providers.

apis.name: YouTube Video Transcript
apis.description: Fetch the transcript/captions of a YouTube video by URL or ID, normalized across providers with transparent failover.

apis.name: Zhihu Answer
apis.description: Fetch a public Zhihu answer with normalized author and question data.

apis.name: Zhihu Profile
apis.description: Fetch a public Zhihu profile with normalized identity and audience data.

apis.name: Zhihu Question
apis.description: Fetch a public Zhihu question with normalized text and engagement statistics.

apis.name: Zhihu Question Answers
apis.description: List public answers to a Zhihu question with normalized authors and engagement data.

apis.name: Zhihu Article Search
apis.description: Search public Zhihu articles by keyword with normalized author and engagement data.

apis.name: Zillow Property
apis.description: Fetch full details for a single Zillow property listing by URL (price, facts and features, photos, and price/tax history).

apis.name: Zillow Search
apis.description: Search Zillow for-sale, rental, or sold listings by region-level location (city, ZIP, county, or neighborhood) with optional price, bedroom, living-area, home-type, recency, and sort filters and get matching properties (price, address, beds, baths, living area, status, Zestimate) as normalized JSON.
